blocks.tagline: Andy Bree, Ryan Hyde, and Kyle Laganella of Braxton & Hyde, Philadelphia Fretworks on joining forces to build a shared lutherie business under one roof.

blocks.html:
Throughout our Loothing for Dollars series, we’ve explored the various ways pros in our craft make the business work—from home-based setups and commercial spaces to loothing on the road or in retail.

In this month’s episode, we’re diving into a unique, loosely knit cooperative model. Join us as we sit down with Andy Bree, Ryan Hyde, and Kyle Laganella of Braxton & Hyde, Philadelphia Fretworks to see how they joined forces to turn their individual career goals into a successful shared lutherie business. These three looths have found a way to bridge their individual needs by joining forces. We’ll explore how this unique partnership keeps their loothing careers thriving.

Aired on Looth Group Live, Sunday, April 19th, 2026.

blocks.caption: Loothing for Dollars: The Multiple-Looth Shop
